name: fgiova-claude-marketplace
description: Directory of Claude Code plugins and extensions

plugins.name: planning-workflow
plugins.description: Plan and execute complex prompts by decomposing them into parallel tasks

plugins.name: fastify-expert
plugins.description: Senior Fastify developer expertise: type-safe APIs, plugin architecture, schema validation, and production patterns

plugins.name: platformatic-runtime
plugins.description: Platformatic Runtime expertise: multi-service orchestration, watt.json configuration, monorepo structure, and testing strategy

plugins.name: tap-testcontainers
plugins.description: Node-tap and Testcontainers integration expertise: container-based testing, test lifecycle, service orchestration, and best practices for Node.js

plugins.name: fastify-testing
plugins.description: Fastify testing expertise with node-tap: unit tests, integration tests, route testing, plugin testing, and best practices

plugins.name: localstack-expert
plugins.description: LocalStack Community Edition expertise with MCP server: local AWS development, docker-compose setup, cdklocal/awslocal tooling, init hooks, and 40 MCP tools for S3/SQS/SNS/Lambda/DynamoDB

plugins.name: prompt-engineer
plugins.description: Structured prompt engineering: guides users step-by-step through a 6-phase framework to build high-quality, reusable prompts
